description_long: This is a compact, rectangular radio receiver with a dark wood-textured body and a black plastic or metal handle arching over the top for portability. The front face features a large black speaker grille on the left, a digital display screen with blue backlighting on the right, and a row of tactile buttons beneath the display for mode selection, tuning, and other functions. Two prominent round knobs are positioned on the top surface, likely for volume and tuning adjustments. The back panel includes various ports, a battery compartment, and printed labels, including the model name 'Tagent Dab2go.' The overall design is modern yet retro-inspired, with a blend of wood and plastic materials and a clear emphasis on usability and portability. The object is suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, garages, or outdoor gatherings.
description: A portable, wood-finished radio receiver with a black handle, digital display, speaker grille, and control knobs. It combines retro aesthetics with modern functionality.
description_view_0: Front view showing the speaker grille, digital display, control buttons, and part of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden body and the profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying ports, battery compartment, labels, and the model name 'Tagent Dab2go.'
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same wooden side and handle profile as view 1.
